data.title: BlackRock's $19 Billion Port Deal With Li Ka-shing Sparks China Scrutiny, State Firms Told To Pause New Ties: Report
data.description: Li Ka-shing's business empire faces scrutiny from China after his company CK Hutchison announced a landmark $19 billion port sale.

data.title: Asia Markets Mixed, Europe Slips On Auto Tariff Worries, Gold Advances Toward Record High - Global Markets Today While US Slept
Arthur Hayes On Bitcoin Trading: Focus On Fiat Liquidity, Not Price Targets
data.description: Arthur Hayes, co-founder of cryptocurrency exchange BitMEX and Chief Investment Officer at Maelstrom Fund, expressed his views on Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) trading, emphasizing the importance of fiat liquidity over specific price targets.

data.title: GE Aerospace Lands Major Korean Air Deal: GEnx And GE9X Engines To Power New Boeing Fleet
data.description: Korean Air orders GEnx and GE9X engines for new fleet of Boeing 777-9s and 787-10s, with a service agreement. GE9X is most powerful and fuel-efficient engine.

data.title: Shiba Inu Burn Rate Skyrockets 57,069%, But Why Did This Whale Burn 1M SHIB?
data.description: Despite Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) prices pulling back, burn rates and whale transactions are surging and fueling optimism for the meme coin's next move.
